context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Handler must now inspect .ok on the fetchWeather Result and map success/failure to 200/500 instead of letting exceptions propagate to the try/catch safety net.
implementation: Check result.ok — return result.data on success, or { error: true, message } with 500 on failure.
